violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. The current certificate expired in 2023.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. Employee bathroom did not have a self closing device.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Cardboard on the floor of the walk-in cooler is not a non-absorbent smooth surface.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Wall by bag/box area has spillage and needs to be cleaned, wall by the condenser over the kegs in the walk-in cooler, floors under the bar sink and drying rack have debris build-up and need to be cleaned.
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
